mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_invites (room_id, created_by, invite_code, expires_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{createdBy}, #{inviteCode}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM room_invites WHERE invite_code = #{inviteCode})
SELECT id, room_id, created_by, invite_code, status, expires_at, created_at FROM room_invites WHERE id = #{inviteId}
SELECT id, room_id, created_by, invite_code, status, expires_at, created_at FROM room_invites WHERE invite_code = #{inviteCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE room_invites SET status = 'CANCELED' WHERE id = #{inviteId} AND created_by = #{createdBy} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE room_invites SET status = 'USED', used_at = #{usedAt} WHERE id = #{inviteId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (room_id, recipient_id, actor_id, type, reference_id) SELECT #{roomId}, user_id, #{actorId}, 'JOIN', #{referenceId} FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
